name: QuoteKG

formData.dct:title: QuoteKG
formData.dct:description: QuoteKG is a large-scale multilingual knowledge graph of quotations, designed to capture and link quotes from public figures across different languages, contexts, and sources.

dcat:distribution.title: QuoteKG dataset files
dcat:distribution.description: Access to QuoteKG datasets, SPARQL endpoint, and documentation.

void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:title: QuoteKG Query Service
void:sparqlEndpoint.dct:description: The QuoteKG SPARQL endpoint provides access to the complete multilingual quotations dataset, allowing users to query quotes, speakers, and alignments across languages and sources.

mod:sampleQueries: SELECT ?Person (COUNT(?quote) AS ?NumberOfQuotes) WHERE {?quote a so:Quotation ;so:spokenByCharacter [ skos:prefLabel ?Person ] .} GROUP BY ?Person ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?quote)
dct:references: QuoteKG: A Multilingual Knowledge Graph of Quotes”(https://www.researchgate.net/publication/360958399_QuoteKG_A_Multilingual _Knowledge_Graph_of_Quotes), Presented at the International Semantic W eb Conference, 2021.

void:exampleResource.dct:title: Quote 1
void:exampleResource.dct:description: Quote 1 refers to The only source of knowledge which is experience

formData.dct:accessRights: The dataset is fully open-access and can be queried, downloaded, and integrated into external systems under open data principles.
